category_sources: source_facts.description says G'MIC is an open-source framework for image processing; official GitHub README describes digital image processing interfaces.
display_name_sources: Official site title and GitHub README use the stylized name G'MIC.
docs_sources: Official G'MIC reference page is the project handbook/reference documentation.
repo_sources: Official G'MIC download page lists G'MIC-core as a git repository at GitHub; GitHub repository identifies itself as GREYC's Magic for Image Computing.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists gmic CLI; official GitHub README lists command-line, library, plug-in, and image-processing interfaces.
